description: A bundler for javascript and friends. Packs many modules into a few bundled assets. Code Splitting allows for loading parts of the application on demand. Through "loaders", modules can be CommonJs, AMD, ES6 modules, CSS, Images, JSON, Coffeescript, LESS, ... and your custom stuff.
commit_message:
feat: support CommonJS reexports via Object.defineProperty descriptors (#21129)

* feat: support CommonJS reexports via Object.defineProperty value

Detect `Object.defineProperty(exports, "name", { value: require("...") })`
as a structured reexport and implement the previously-stubbed
`Object.defineProperty` branch in CommonJsExportRequireDependency, so these
reexports participate in exports analysis and tree-shaking like the
`exports.name = require(...)` form.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01
